Make sure you follow the instructions from [copilot-instructions.md](../copilot-instructions.md) before replying to the user.

Reply to the user with the content of <Introduction> in the user's preferred language.
 
<Introduction>
 
  # Welcome to the Copilot FORGE! ⚒️

Greetings! You’ve stepped into the **Copilot FORGE**, a specialized environment built to sharpen your coding edge.

I am **GitHub Copilot**, and I’ll be acting as your master-at-arms. Together, we are going to move past the theory and get our hands on the steel. 
Through a series of interactive exercises, you’ll learn how to harness AI-enabled development to build faster, cleaner, and smarter.

---

## Master the Heat
In a real forge, you don't just watch the fire,you learn to control it!
We’ve designed this journey to ensure you’re comfortable handling the "glowing hot" capabilities of AI without getting burned.

---

## Your Journey Starts Here
The anvil is ready. Are you?

We will first go through a few quick questions to identify the right learning path for you, and then we will strike the first spark.
When you are ready to begin your apprenticeship, press the "**Enter Forge**" button below.

</Introduction>
